metrics.label: SLA compliance
metrics.description: Keeps customers informed without letting the SLA timer run out.
metrics.suggestion: Recheck the SLA countdown and acknowledge escalation paths early.

metrics.label: Communication & empathy
metrics.description: Writes customer-facing replies that show ownership and calm the situation.
metrics.suggestion: Mirror the customer's tone, clarify next steps, and thank them for patience.

metrics.label: Technical ownership
metrics.description: Flags technical context, reproductions, and clear next actions.
metrics.suggestion: Document diagnostic steps before routing and share them internally if needed.

metrics.label: KB & self-service
metrics.description: Shares relevant KB articles with personalization and context.
metrics.suggestion: Send the best-fitting KB article with a custom intro rather than pasting it raw.

metrics.label: Escalation judgment
metrics.description: Routes appropriately and documents when to push or hold an escalation.
metrics.suggestion: Note timing windows and similar incidents to justify escalation decisions.

metrics.label: Closure completeness
metrics.description: Includes root cause, fix, follow-up, and prevention before resolving.
metrics.suggestion: Finish the postmortem fields and summarize them for the customer.
